scope: Resident individual, HUF. Rates apply to assessment year 2027-28 (FY 2026-27).
source_name: Income Tax Department, Government of India
notes: Post-Budget 2024 (Finance Act 2024, effective 23-Jul-2024) major restructuring: LTCG rate unified to 12.5% across asset classes; indexation removed for new acquisitions; STCG on equity raised to 20%. Budget 2026-27 made no further changes to these rates. Grandfathering: property acquired before 23-Jul-2024 can opt for 20% with indexation if beneficial.

equity_and_equity_mf.notes: Listed equity shares and equity-oriented mutual funds where STT is paid at time of sale.

stcg.notes: Raised from 15% to 20% by Finance Act 2024 effective 23-Jul-2024

grandfathering.applies_to: Assets acquired before 23-Jul-2024 by resident individual/HUF
grandfathering.option: May choose 20% with indexation if it results in lower tax

stcg.notes: Added to total income and taxed at applicable income tax slab rate

ltcg.notes: Added to total income and taxed as per slab since Finance Act 2023

set_off_and_carry_forward.special_fy2026_27: Long-term capital losses incurred up to 31-Mar-2026 can be set off against STCG in AY 2027-28 (FY 2026-27) — one-time transitional provision.
